summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KLEAN Barbershop premium website. All core functionality working perfectly - navigation, booking integration, gallery filters, FAQ accordions, contact page with Google Maps, mobile responsiveness, and French content. 98% success rate.

design_issues.issue: Floating booking button on mobile not detected
design_issues.note: May not be implemented - all other booking buttons work perfectly

passed_tests: All 7 navigation pages accessible and load correctly
Booking buttons link to correct Setmore URL with target='_blank'
Gallery category filters (6 filters) work perfectly
FAQ accordions (10 questions) open and close correctly
Contact page displays all information correctly
Google Maps embed loads with correct Tigery, France location
Phone, address, and Instagram links work properly
Mobile hamburger menu opens/closes with all 8 navigation links
Desktop navigation properly hidden on mobile
Services pricing displays correctly (20€-25€ coupes, 12€-30€ rasage, 250€ VIP)
All external integrations work (Setmore, Google Maps, Instagram)
